extraction.labelText:
BRAND NAME: SILVER RIDGE CELLARS
Red Wine
California
Vintage 2023
13.5% Alc./Vol.
750 mL
Contains sulfites.
Produced and bottled by Silver Ridge Cellars, Sonoma, CA
GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
extraction.governmentWarning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
notes: Parsed from supplied text/OCR paste without calling a vision model.

extraction.labelText:
BRAND NAME: HARBOR GLEN VINEYARDS
Table Wine
Oregon
Vintage 2022
750 mL
Contains sulfites.
Produced and bottled by Harbor Glen Vineyards, Dundee, OR
GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
Visual note: glare over the Government Warning makes exact statutory punctuation uncertain.
extraction.governmentWarning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.
